title: Salesforce Consulting & Implementation
excerpt: Maximize your CRM ROI with tailored Salesforce solutions, from initial implementation to custom AppExchange development.
content:
## Transform Your Customer Relationships

At Momentaj, we specialize in end-to-end Salesforce implementations. Whether you are migrating from a legacy system or looking to optimize your current Sales Cloud or Service Cloud instances, our certified experts are here to help.

### Our Capabilities
* **Sales & Service Cloud Setup:** Streamline your sales pipelines and support ticketing.
* **Marketing Cloud:** Automate customer journeys and multi-channel campaigns.
* **Custom Apex & LWC Development:** Build specialized tools tailored to your exact business logic.

title: Web & Mobile App Development
excerpt: Build scalable, high-performance web and mobile applications using modern frameworks and cloud-native architectures.
content:
## Build for the Future

We deliver custom software that scales with your business. From complex web portals to native iOS and Android applications, our development team ensures a flawless user experience and robust backend architecture.

title: IoT & Smart Solutions
excerpt: Connect your physical assets to the cloud with secure, scalable Internet of Things (IoT) architectures and real-time dashboards.
content:
## Connect the Physical and Digital Worlds

We build robust IoT ecosystems that allow businesses to monitor, control, and analyze their hardware in real-time. 

### What We Offer
* **Hardware Integration:** Seamless connection with sensors, beacons, and smart devices.
* **Real-time Analytics:** Custom dashboards to monitor telemetry data.
* **Predictive Maintenance:** Utilize machine learning on your IoT data to prevent downtime before it happens.
